policy.title: Privacy Policy
policy.para1: At Fidar Technologies, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.
policy.section1_body: We collect personal details such as your name, email, Customer ID, and technical data like IP address and browser information.
policy.section2_body: We use your information to authenticate your account, improve our services, and ensure cybersecurity compliance.
policy.section3_body: All sensitive data is encrypted and protected using modern cybersecurity standards to prevent unauthorized access.
policy.section4_body: You may access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data at any time.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.para1: By using the services of Fidar Technologies, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
terms.section1_body: You agree to use this platform only for lawful and authorized purposes.
terms.section2_body: Users are responsible for keeping their login credentials confidential.
terms.section3_body: All content and code are owned by Fidar Technologies and may not be copied, modified, or reused without permission.
terms.section4_body: These terms are governed by the applicable laws of your jurisdiction.

landing.hero_subtitle: A phishing-resistant authentication platform built on zero-trust architecture — powered by cryptography, behavioral intelligence & AI to effectively prevent fraud and restore customer trust.
landing.why_desc: Optimizes fraud costs, improves conversions and removes friction by eliminating OTPs and knowledge-based authentication.
landing.why_reduce_desc: Eliminate OTP SMS costs and lower operational burden across call centers and fraud teams.
landing.why_convert_desc: Frictionless flows reduce cart abandonment and accelerate transactions.
landing.why_future_desc: Passwordless, cryptographic device binding and adaptive step-up authentication aligned with evolving standards.
landing.features_desc: Omnichannel authentication across mobile banking, internet banking, payments, ATMs and contact centers.
landing.f1_desc: Phishing-resistant WebAuthN / FIDO flows that remove OTPs and passwords from the user journey.
landing.f2_desc: Secure NFC-enabled device binding for fast, secure ATMs and cardless flows.
landing.f3_desc: Streamlined e-commerce authentication for faster checkout with less friction.
landing.f4_desc: Secure agent access and seamless customer verification without PINs or security questions.
landing.security_desc: Multiple independent security layers work in harmony to deliver end-to-end protection and resilience.
landing.s1_desc: No single point of failure — designed for continuity and enhanced breach resistance.
landing.s2_desc: Fingerprinting, behavioral analytics, and proximity checks enhance authentication decisions.
landing.s3_desc: AI-powered risk assessment and step-up flows to counter evolving threats.
landing.customers_desc: Across mobile, web, ATMs, and contact centers — reducing fraud and improving UX.
landing.c1_quote: Onboarding was seamless — instant beneficiary addition and faster transfers.
landing.c2_quote: Frictionless flows removed OTP friction — conversions improved immediately.
landing.c3_quote: Strong device binding and layered defence reduced fraud exposure.
